_meta.purpose: Sample beat manifest for Phase 2g's playable run + Phase 3a.1 station encounters. Mirrors Ink's runtime shape (text + choices) so BeatRunner can read it verbatim.

choice_object.label: display text
choice_object.delta: optional key-value patch applied to per-run state

ai_briefing_1.speaker: ai
ai_briefing_1.text: Captain {captain_name}, your genship of registration is {genship_id}. I am your AI. The crew will meet in the aft gallery. Proceed when ready.

crew_meetup_1.speaker: narrator
crew_meetup_1.text: The aft gallery smells of recycle-air and dry ice. Two figures turn at your approach. They read your invoice-code once, twice.

overworld_choose_1.speaker: narrator
overworld_choose_1.text: Dock control offers three destinations: a quiet refueling outpost, a salvage derelict, or the unionised belt transit at Coral.

station_arrival_refuel.speaker: narrator
station_arrival_refuel.text: The outpost is a tethered cluster of fuel bladders and a single loading arm. A tech in patched coveralls waves you to the pump bay without looking up. The hum is steady. Nothing here surprises anyone.

choices.label: Ask the tech if she runs credit.

station_refuel_standard.speaker: ai
station_refuel_standard.text: Fuel +25. The ledger logs the outpost as visited. {crew_name_one} checks the moorings. The tech moves on to her next job before you thank her.

station_refuel_credit.speaker: narrator
station_refuel_credit.text: The tech finally looks up. "Credit runs through the {genship_id} ledger — you'll settle at quarter-end." She taps a slate. Fuel flows. The rate is the same. The debt is now institutional.

station_arrival_derelict.speaker: narrator
station_arrival_derelict.text: The derelict hangs in a slow tumble. Hull breach on the port side — someone cut it open and welded it shut again, badly. Your docking clamp catches. {crew_name_two} runs a sniff test. The air reads stale but breathable.

station_derelict_solo.speaker: crew
station_derelict_solo.text: "Captain. I found something. A cargo manifest — the {genship_id} seal, but the date is wrong. Three years before the program started." {crew_name_two} holds out the slate. The handwriting is neat. The numbers don't add up.

choices.label: Stash the manifest. Tell no one.
Share it with the crew now.

station_derelict_group.speaker: narrator
station_derelict_group.text: You enter together. The corridor walls are scorched — someone ran a cutting torch along the seams, looking for something. {crew_name_one} finds a sealed locker. Inside: a Trust-clearance code, expired. But the cipher family is current.

choices.label: Take the code to the AI for analysis.
Pocket it. The AI doesn't need everything.

station_arrival_coral.speaker: narrator
station_arrival_coral.text: Coral station is a wheel of union halls and transit authority offices. The belt's only place where genship crews mix without a handler. Your invoice-code gets you through the gate. The crowd reads it and knows what you are.

choices.label: Head to the union hall. Listen first.
Find a handler. You need work, not politics.
Avoid the crowd. Use the side docks.

station_coral_hall.speaker: narrator
station_coral_hall.text: The hall is loud. Three crews at a table. A {genship_id} patch on one shoulder — your genship, but a crew you've never met. They're talking about the last captain. Your predecessor. They stop when you sit down.

choices.label: "I'm the new captain. Tell me what happened to them."

station_coral_handler.speaker: narrator
station_coral_handler.text: The handler is a woman with a tablet and a tired smile. "{genship_id}. You're the new one. I've got a run — low-risk, good pay. But it goes through derelict space. Your call."

choices.label: Decline. You're not ready for derelict runs.

station_coral_silent.speaker: ai
station_coral_silent.text: You dock at the side arm. No one sees. {crew_name_one} doesn't ask why. The fuel line is unmarked — you siphon what you need. The ledger won't record this stop. But someone on the dock watched you leave.

choices.label: Log the fuel and move on.

end_of_run_1.speaker: ai
end_of_run_1.text: Run complete. Your discoveries land in the ledger. The next captain's brief will reference you.
